package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_scopes_defined_inline_repeatedly: Repeated ad hoc scope functions instead of shared named scopes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule066NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule066NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule066NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario066Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule066NegativeService, input Rule066NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
